title: Frost Arrows│寒凍之箭
description: Feel the icy arrows; Strays' attacks will now freeze you.│感受冰冷的箭矢，現在流髑的攻擊將冰凍你。
body:
# Function│功能
1. When arrows shot by Strays hit a creature, they will apply a 10-second freezing effect, replacing the original slowness effect.│流髑射出的箭矢擊中生物時，將施加10秒的冰凍效果，取代原來的緩速效果。
2. Strays will now drop Frost Arrows, replacing their original Slowness Arrows.│流髑現在會掉落冰凍之箭，取代原來的遲緩之箭。
3. Enter this command to get the Frost Arrow: ```/loot give @s loot frost_arrows:frost_arrow```.│輸入該指令可獲取寒凍之箭：```/loot give @s loot frost_arrows:frost_arrow```。
# Precautions│注意事項
1. The item name and item description of "Frost Arrow" only support three languages: ```zh_cn```,```zh_tw```,```en_us```. If you need it to support more languages, please let me know by reporting the issue.│"冰凍之箭"的物品名稱和物品描述只支援```zh_cn```,```zh_tw```,```en_us```三種語言，如果你需要其支援更多語言，請透過匯報問題讓我知道。
2. You need to have [Modify Player Data](https://modrinth.com/mod/modify-player-data/) installed for the freezing effect to work properly on the player.│你需要安裝 [Modify Player Data](https://modrinth.com/mod/modify-player-data/) ，冰凍效果才可正常施加到玩家身上。
3. The datapack achieves this effect via a custom enchantment called "frost_arrows", so if you see an enchanted book with the "frost_arrows" enchantment in your Creative Inventory, please ignore it.│該資料包透過名為"frost_arrows"的自訂附魔來實現此效果，因此如果您在創造模式物品欄中看到帶有"frost_arrows"附魔的附魔書，請忽略它。
